sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20105" key="blefaro/custon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βλεφᾰρό-ξυστον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n20105.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">an instrument for trimming the eyelids</tr_>, Paul.
